headlines.title: Regular Coffee Consumption Linked to Health Benefits, AHA Says
headlines.description: A new report from the American Heart Association says that it's safe for most adults to drink up to five cups of coffee per day. New research also suggests regular coffee consumption may be linked to lower risk of stroke, diabetes, and heart failure for some individuals. Health benefits apply to paper filtered or instant coffee.

headlines.title: Best Summer Nutrition Advice: Fiber Intake, Warm Water, More
headlines.description: Dr. Amy Shah, board-certified physician and nutritionist and New York Times bestselling author of “Hormone Havoc,” joins TODAY to break down summer nutrition trends including low-carb diets and intermittent fasting, protein foods and more.

headlines.title: Summer Health Facts vs. Myths: Swimmer’s Ear, Ticks, More
headlines.description: Dr. Jen Caudle, family physician and associate professor at Rowan University, joins TODAY to separate fact from fiction on common summer health myths like Seasonal Affective Disorder, swimmer’s ear, mosquito bites and more.

headlines.title: Taylor Farms Lettuce Test for Cyclospora Was False Positive: FDA
headlines.description: There is new confusion on the cyclospora outbreak sickening thousands of people across the country after the FDA says that a test sample of Taylor Farms lettuce produced a false positive for the disease. The agency says no products have tested positive for the disease yet and that it's continuing to investigate the outbreak. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: All the glow, none of the grease — the best hyaluronic acid products
headlines.description: Dermatologists share the best hyaluronic acid serums and creams to hydrate, plump and smooth your skin from brands like CeraVe and The Ordinary.

headlines.title: This Farberware salad spinner is more than 30% off, and perfect for washing lettuce and other produce
headlines.description: With cyclosporiasis cases rising, washing lettuce and products is incredibly important. This salad spinner is over 30% off.

headlines.title: The 13+ best items to shop from Calpak, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: We’ve owned and tested more than 13 items from Calpak, including duffels and backpacks. Here are the best items to shop from the travel accessory retailer.

headlines.title: The best way to clean strawberries so that they’re safe to eat
headlines.description: I spoke to experts to find the best way to clean strawberries to make them safe to eat and to help avoid illness. I also recommend products to help clean strawberries.

headlines.title: RFK Jr. says cyclosporiasis outbreak is ‘under control’ amid investigation into its origins
headlines.description: Mexico said its own investigation hasn’t found evidence linking the outbreak to the Taylor Farms facility in central Mexico.

headlines.title: Cyclospora parasite not found in any Taylor Farm lettuce samples after product recall, FDA says
headlines.description: A Food and Drug Administration test on a sample of lettuce from a supplier that has recalled products because of a multistate cyclosporiasis outbreak produced a false positive for the parasite, the agency said Sunday.

headlines.title: FDA says it’s still investigating Taylor Farms in cyclosporiasis outbreak
headlines.description: Taylor Farms continues to be the subject of a Food and Drug Administration investigation into the growing cyclosporiasis outbreak, despite a false positive test result, the agency said Monday.

headlines.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you
headlines.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.
